heading: Three-year programs or projects
label: 6437 Three-year programs or projects
text: If a State agency operates a program or project under this subpart in which individual children or youth are likely to participate for more than 1 year, the State educational agency may approve the State agency’s application for a subgrant under this subpart for a period of not more than 3 years.
